/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,librostime.so -o /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rostime/lib/librostime.so CMakeFiles/rostime.dir/src/duration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rostime.dir/src/rate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rostime.dir/src/time.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0
